# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Job Deployment Workflow

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      artifact_path: ${{ steps.upload.outputs.artifact_path }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      
      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Build project
        run: npm run build

      - name: Upload artifacts
        id: upload
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: project-artifacts
          path: ./dist

  deploy_staging:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: project-artifacts

      - name: Deploy to staging
        run: |
          echo "Running staging deployment scripts..."
          ./deploy/staging.sh

  deploy_production:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: deploy_staging
    steps:
      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: project-artifacts

      - name: Deploy to production
        run: |
          echo "Running production deployment scripts..."
          ./deploy/production.sh
